headings.usage_rules: Use for all page titles, stat card numbers, and modal headers. Never use Inter for headings. It provides an industrial, solid construction feel.

body.usage_rules: Use for all data tables, labels, tooltips, and body text. Highly legible for dense technical interfaces.

data_display.usage_rules: Use for extracted phone numbers, dates, and API keys to align numerical data perfectly.

background.description: Deep navy blueprint background. Never use pure black. Tinted heavily with blue to match 'Dark navy color scheme'.

brand.description: Primary CTA is Sky Blue. Processing/Accent is Construction Amber. High visibility against dark navy.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Dense, functional, optimized for scanning and data extraction tasks.

header.style: Solid Background with a hard bottom border
header.classes: bg-[#0A0F1C] border-b border-slate-800 sticky top-0 z-50 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6

stat_cards.style: Technical look. Flat background, sharp edges.
stat_cards.classes: bg-[#111827] border border-slate-800 rounded-sm p-5 hover:border-slate-700 transition-colors flex flex-col gap-2

upload_zone.style: The Technical Grid Border. Dashed border with subtle background tint.
upload_zone.classes: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/30 rounded-sm p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center hover:border-sky-500 hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

data_table.header_classes: bg-[#111827] text-slate-400 font-medium text-xs uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-4 text-left border-b border-slate-800
data_table.row_classes: border-b border-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-800/30 transition-colors text-sm text-slate-300

buttons.primary: bg-sky-500 hover:bg-sky-600 text-white rounded-sm px-5 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0A0F1C] inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-700 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-2
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-2

progress_bar.fill: bg-amber-500 h-full transition-all duration-300 ease-out shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(245,158,11,0.5)]

icons_and_assets.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a technical, precise feel. Icons should be 16px to 20px.

images.description: Abstract dark architectural pattern. Use as a split-screen background on the login page with a heavy overlay (bg-[#0A0F1C]/80) to ensure text legibility.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against the #0A0F1C background meets AA (4.5:1) contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard pure HTML/Tailwind for structural dashboard layouts. Do not wrap entire pages in Shadcn card components.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for interactive/complex logic elements: Tables, Dialogs, Dropdowns, Progress, Tabs, Toasts.
Implement Shadcn Tabs for navigating between 'Results', 'Issues Table', and 'Run History' on the dashboard.
Ensure the data table is highly compact for business scanning. Override Shadcn Table default paddings to py-2 px-3.
For the file upload, implement a drag-and-drop zone using the defined upload_zone classes. Hide the native file input visually.
Install Google Fonts 'Work Sans' (Headings) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (Body) via standard methodology.
Ensure the layout is completely mobile responsive with a flex-col fallback for the Control Room Grid on small screens.
